original_image_tags: large black-and-white artist's rendering showing a large, circular, disc-shaped craft resting in a forest clearing. A cylindrical structure rises from the center of the disc. Two small, dark, humanoid figures stand near the object. Dense forest surrounds the clearing.
black-and-white photograph of an older man with glasses (Oskar Linke) and a younger girl (his step-daughter) leaning over a table, looking down at what appears to be a drawing or map.
cropped photograph of a typed and stamped German legal document.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A newspaper front page titled “SUNDAY GRAPHIC” with large headline text about “The most amazing Flying Saucer story of them all,” containing two black-and-white photographs/illustrations: one large artist’s impression of a flying saucer in a forest clearing with two small figures beside it, and one smaller photo of a man and a girl examining a paper; a separate inset image at lower left shows a document with stamps and handwriting.*
